creator: jaglover@gmail.com
text:
The Java installation is older than Unifi installation. So no, there was no Java version change.
I did not edit the rc script, it is as it came with tarball.

Currently I have issues with this computer, my home was flooded during "historic Louisiana flood" and all equipment was submerged.

Will return to this when I get a chance to see if this box can be resurrected.
